ground_truth.title: Welcome to the NYC Human Resources Administration - HRA
ground_truth.main_content:
Notice of Class Action Settlement for New Yorkers who received Consumer Directed Personal Assistance Program (CDPAP) services in March of 2025 and meet other criteria. Read the notice in English, Spanish, or other languages available through NY State Department of Health. An Optional Facilitator Selection Form is also available.

HOPE 2026: Learn more and sign up for NYC HOPE at nyc.gov/hope.

CityFHEPS Road Map: Learn more about the process for signing a lease and moving in once you have a CityFHEPS shopping letter and have found housing.

Benefit Replacement Claims: As of September 30, 2025, New York State will stop accepting all benefit replacement claims for SNAP. This does not affect replacement claims for Cash Assistance.

Recent Announcements: The OCSS Brooklyn Borough Office Relocation.

Don't Risk Losing Your SNAP or CA Benefits! Sanctions Are Coming Back!

Quick Links: Community Updates, SNAP Centers & Other DSS/HRA Locations, Child Support Services, NYC Benefits Partners, How to Apply for Cash Assistance, Adult Protective Services, Sexual Assault & Harassment Survivors, Register to Vote, Contact Us.

I speak...: Select from 16 language options including Español, العربية, Shqiptare, 简体中文, 繁體中文, Kreyòl Ayisyen, Italiano, 한국어, Pусский, বাংলা, Français, Polski, Pulaar, اردو, Wolof, יידיש.

Programs & Initiatives: ACCESS HRA Portal - Visit HRA's portal to apply and manage your SNAP and Cash benefits online. Child Support Services - Help kids get support from both parents. Apply for services. Sign up for job training. Food Help NYC - Locate free meals at food pantries and soup kitchens near you. Fair Fares NYC - With Fair Fares NYC, eligible City residents may buy a 7-day or 30-day pass for half the price. HIV/AIDS Services - Helping people living with HIV/AIDS to live independent, healthy lives. Homebase - If you are about to become homeless, Homebase can help you stay out of shelter. Disability Access - Learn how to request Reasonable Accommodation for HRA services. Voting.NYC - Everything New Yorkers need to vote.
